title: First Bigger Read
intendedTensionBeat: Broad side clears look productive while the true rescue progress is in the central lane.
intendedReleaseBeat: Reading the central route correctly makes the larger board feel manageable.
expectedPath: Prioritize the central lane and rescue sequence instead of farming side groups.
expectedFailMode: Player takes satisfying broad side clears and wastes the action budget.
designNotes: This is a readability test. Do not make it visually mushy.
